text:
Prediction: No

The current visit record indicates that the patient has been diagnosed with an acute myocardial infarction and coronary atherosclerosis, but there is no explicit evidence of a lipid disorder such as hypercholesterolemia or hyperlipidemia. The absence of any recorded medications related to lipid management or specific diagnoses of lipid metabolism disorders means that there is no strong indication that a "Disorders of Lipid Metabolism" diagnosis will be coded in the next hospital visit. The presence of cardiovascular diseases and procedures performed does not suffice to predict a future diagnosis of lipid disorders without clear evidence of an existing lipid abnormality.
